listitem.para:
A list of proposals specifying the cryptographic algorithms to negotiate when establishing an ESP Child SA (Phase 2 IPsec SA). DH). For instance:
esp=aes_gcm;aes128+aes256-sha2_512+sha2_256 esp=aes128-sha2_512;dh19
The basic syntax is: ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHMS["-"INTEGRITY_ALGORITHMS]["-"KEM_ALGORITHMS] For the full syntax, see the Proposals section.
Enabled cryptographic algorithms and default proposals are logged by &pluto; during startup (see &ipsec-pluto.8;).
